case_title: ARTURO SEGOVIANO VS. MARLIN SIMPSON et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-05-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-05-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF TO SUBMITT FURTHER EVIDENCE. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) A REPRESENTATIVE APPEARED ON BEHALF OF THE PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY PLAINTIFF.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-06-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG, MARK ANTHONY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-05-2009 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-29-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPSON, MARLIN DBA SIMPSON TRUCKING

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SEGOVIANO, ARTURO AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPSON, MARLIN DBA SIMPSON TRUCKING YOUNG, MARK ANTHONY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-04-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-05-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEGOVIANO, ARTURO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIMPSON, MARLIN DBA SIMPSON TRUCKING YOUNG, MARK ANTHONY $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,705.00, DEFENDANTS NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
